title: Database Setup
description: Set up SQLAlchemy 2.0 async engine in core/database.py. Configure Alembic for async migrations. Create a BaseModel class with id (uuid7), created_at, updated_at columns. Use asyncpg as the driver.
validation: SQLAlchemy async engine configured in src/agentauth/core/database.py
BaseModel class exists with id (uuid7), created_at, updated_at
alembic upgrade head runs without errors
